resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def canBeTypedWords(self, text: str, brokenLetters: str) -> int:
        broken = set(brokenLetters)
        return sum(all(c not in broken for c in word) for word in text.split())
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(N + M)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Convert brokenLetters to a set for O(1) lookups. Split text into words and count those whose characters are all absent from the set. Linear scan of each character once; set operations are constant-time.
